rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Non-Microsoft App Package Installation Process

rules.rule_text:
title: Non-Microsoft App Package Installation Process
id: ca15c3dc-243f-432d-868b-c7694027be21
status: experimental
description: "Detects app package installation processes where the app is not a Microsoft\
  \ app \nbased on the publisher ID. Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/installer-packages/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1546
- attack.t1546.016
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|contains:
    - C:\Program Files\WindowsApps
    - C:\Program Files (x86)\WindowsApps
  filter:
    Image|contains:
    - 8wekyb3d8bbwe
    - cw5n1h2txyewy
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
